chart.title: Events by Device
chart.searchString: eventtype=netscaler_syslog log_type="UI" | stats count by host

chart.title: Admin Events by User
chart.searchString: eventtype=netscaler_syslog log_type="UI" | stats count by user

table.searchString: eventtype=netscaler_syslog | stats list(status) as status values(command) as commands by user _time
